verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Purify Your people, O God Cleanse us with Your fire O Lord May we walk uprightly In the presence of Your love Purify Your people, O God

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Make us holy Lord, we pray In Your likeness Righteous in our ways Let us be a praise To the glory of Your grace Purify Your people, O God

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Consume me Lord by the fire of Your Spirit. Consume me Lord And make me more like You. Won't You break me Lord And bless the broken pieces of my life; Let me be used, Lord, by You!
